title: BTA Low-Res Packs (2x)
description: 2x version of the low resolution resource packs for use with British Transport Addon
body:
# British Transport Addon Low Resolution Resource Packs

Can't run BTA on your system due to the textures being too large? You can now use this to either allow you to run the mod, or to improve framerate. This pack shrinks down BTA's textures down so that you don't need as much RAM/VRAM and your GPU doesn't need to be so powerful.

If your PC can't run BTA at all without this pack, then you'll need to modify your options.txt file directly.

Links to each resolution option:
- For 1024x, check out the Potato PC version, avaliable in the additional files section of the mod!
- [512x Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bta-low-res-packs-512x)
- [256x Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bta-low-res-packs-256x)
- [128x Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bta-low-res-packs-128x)
- [64x Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bta-low-res-packs-64x)
- [32x Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bta-low-res-packs-32x)
- [16x Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bta-low-res-packs-16x)
- [8x Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bta-low-res-packs-8x)
- [4x Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bta-low-res-packs-4x)
- [2x Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bta-low-res-packs-2x)
- [1x Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bta-low-res-packs-1x)

Please note that all textures in this pack are All Rights Reserved and cannot be distibuted apart from when the file is directly downloaded from Modrinth, eg. a Modrinth modpack (excluding being overriden in the pack, must be in manifest) or a packwiz pack
